title: Teacher approves a student application
description: A teacher can review a student PKL application and approve it so the student sees the updated status.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a teacher account
Verify the application status is updated to approved

title: Sign in and reach the correct dashboard
description: A signed-in user should land on the dashboard for their role after entering valid credentials.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the dashboard for the signed-in role is displayed

title: Create a PKL application draft
description: A student should be able to create and save a new PKL application draft with supporting details.

steps.description: Sign in with valid student credentials
Create a new PKL application draft
Fill in the application details with valid values
Verify the draft application is listed

title: Approve a newly registered user
description: An admin can review a pending user and approve the account so it becomes usable in the system.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user is shown as approved

title: Land on the correct dashboard for each role
description: Each supported role should open to its own dashboard after signing in.

steps.description: Sign in with valid admin credentials
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Sign in with valid student credentials
Verify the student dashboard is displayed

title: Submit a PKL application for review
description: A student should be able to submit a draft application and see it move to waiting for approval.

steps.description: Sign in with valid student credentials
Verify the application status changes to waiting for approval

title: Student submits a PKL application draft
description: A student can create a PKL application draft, provide the required details, and save it for later submission.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a student account
Create a new PKL application draft
Fill in the required application details
Verify the saved application draft is displayed

title: See a pending approval message when trying to sign in too early
description: An unapproved account should not be allowed into the app and should be shown a waiting-for-approval message.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with an unapproved account email
Fill in the password field with the matching password
Verify a pending approval message is visible

title: Teacher rejects a student application with notes
description: A teacher can reject a student PKL application and add a note that is visible to the student.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a teacher account
Verify the application status is updated to rejected
Verify the review note is displayed

title: Block access to another role area
description: A signed-in user should be denied access when trying to open a page for a different role.

steps.description: Sign in with valid student credentials
Click the link to open the teacher area
Verify an access denied message is visible

title: Create a new account and see it pending approval
description: A new user should be able to register successfully and see that the account is waiting for admin approval.

steps.description: Fill in the registration details with valid values
Verify an account creation confirmation is visible
Verify a pending approval message is visible

title: Student submits supporting document with the application
description: A student can add the supporting document to a PKL application and keep the application ready for submission.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a student account
Verify the supporting document is shown for the application

title: Review pending users list
description: An admin can open the pending users page and see newly registered users waiting for approval.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Prevent more than one active application
description: A student should be blocked from creating or submitting another active PKL application while one already exists.

steps.description: Sign in with valid student credentials
Create and save a new PKL application draft
Attempt to create another active application
Verify only one active application is allowed

title: Save final PKL scores for a supervised student
description: A teacher can enter final PKL scores and save them so the assessment is recorded and the PKL is completed.

steps.description: Fill in the teacher credentials and submit the login form
Open a supervised student's assessment form
Enter scores for attitude, skills, and report
Verify the final score is recorded and the PKL is marked as completed

title: Teacher requests a revision for a student application
description: A teacher can request a revision on a PKL application and record the feedback the student must address.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a teacher account
Verify the application status is updated to revision needed
Verify the revision note is displayed

title: Student sees the teacher review outcome
description: A student can open the application history and see the latest teacher decision and notes after review.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a student account
Verify the latest application status is displayed
Verify the teacher notes are displayed

title: Review the latest application status and notes
description: A student should be able to open an application and see the current review outcome and teacher notes.

steps.description: Sign in with valid student credentials
Verify the latest application status is visible

title: First journal entry starts ongoing PKL status
description: When a student saves the first journal entry after approval, the PKL status changes to ongoing.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a student account
Create and save the first journal entry after application approval
Verify the PKL status changes to ongoing
Verify the new journal entry is displayed

title: Student clocks in for today
description: A student can record a daily attendance entry for the current day and see it saved afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a student account
Clock in for the current day
Verify today's attendance record is displayed

title: Student creates a daily journal entry
description: A student can create a journal entry with activity details and save it for later validation.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a student account
Fill in the daily activity details
Verify the saved journal entry is displayed

title: Update an existing PKL application draft
description: A student should be able to open an editable draft and save changes to the application.

steps.description: Sign in with valid student credentials
Update the application details with valid changes
Verify the updated draft application is displayed

title: Student cannot clock in twice on the same day
description: A student can only create one attendance entry per day and the page should show the existing record instead of allowing a second one.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a student account
Clock in for the current day
Attempt to clock in again for the current day
Verify only one attendance entry is shown for today
Verify the page reflects that attendance was already recorded

title: Submit a final report for review
description: A student can upload a final PKL report and submit it so the report appears in the review list.

steps.description: Fill in the student credentials and submit the login form
Upload a valid final report file
Verify the submitted report is listed for review

title: Teacher validates a student journal
description: A teacher can validate a journal entry and the journal status becomes valid for the student.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a teacher account
Verify the journal status is updated to valid

title: Approve multiple pending users one by one
description: An admin can approve more than one pending user from the review page and see each account move out of the pending list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the first pending user entry
Open the next pending user entry
Verify the approved users are no longer shown in the pending list

title: Student revises a returned journal entry
description: A student can open a journal returned for revision, update it, and save the revised entry for re-review.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a student account
Open a journal entry that needs revision
Edit the journal content or documentation
Verify the revised journal entry is displayed
Verify the entry is ready for review

title: Teacher requests revision on a student journal
description: A teacher can request a revision for a journal entry and add feedback that the student can act on.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a teacher account
Verify the journal status is updated to revision needed
Verify the revision note is displayed

title: Resubmit a revised final report
description: A student can revise a returned final report, upload the updated file, and send it again for review.

steps.description: Fill in the student credentials and submit the login form
Open a report returned for revision
Upload an updated final report file
Verify the revised report is sent again for review

title: Student saves a journal with documentation
description: A student can attach optional documentation to a journal entry and keep the entry available for review.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a student account
Fill in the daily activity details
Verify the journal entry is displayed with its documentation

title: Approve a submitted final report
description: A teacher can review a submitted final report and approve it so the report status is updated accordingly.

steps.description: Fill in the teacher credentials and submit the login form
Verify the report status is updated to approved

title: See approved user status after refreshing the review page
description: An admin can approve a user and return to the review page to confirm the account no longer appears as pending.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Return to the pending users list
Verify the approved account is no longer listed among pending users

title: Request a revision for a final report
description: A teacher can review a submitted final report, request a revision, and add a note so the report is marked for correction.

steps.description: Fill in the teacher credentials and submit the login form
Verify the report status is updated to revision needed

title: Teacher views supervised student attendance
description: A teacher can open the attendance monitoring page and see the attendance history for supervised students.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for a teacher account
Verify the supervised attendance list is displayed
Verify student attendance history is visible

title: Industrial supervisor views placement attendance
description: An industrial supervisor can open the attendance monitoring page and see the attendance history for students at their placement.

steps.description: Fill in the credentials for an industrial supervisor account
Verify the placement attendance list is displayed
Verify student attendance history is visible

title: Request a password reset link
description: A user should be able to request a password reset link from the password recovery page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with a registered account email
Verify a password reset confirmation is visible

title: View the notifications inbox
description: A logged-in user can open the shared inbox and review recent status updates and activity notifications.

steps.description: Fill in valid credentials for any role and submit the login form
Verify status change notifications are visible

title: Leave a pending user unapproved
description: An admin can review the pending users page without approving anyone and the pending account remains listed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Return to the pending users list without approving the account
Verify the user is still shown as pending
